title: US Franchise Costs 2025 — 623 Brands (FDD data)
subtitle: Investment, royalties, units, financials & health scores from 2025 FDDs
description:
Structured cost data for 623 U.S. franchise brands, extracted from 2025 Franchise Disclosure Documents (FDDs) filed with state regulators.

Every franchisor is legally required to file an FDD before selling franchises. These documents disclose initial investment ranges, royalty structures, advertising fund contributions, unit growth data, financial performance representations (Item 19), litigation history, and contract terms.

This dataset extracts 33 key data points per brand into a single, comparable format across 22 industry categories (Retail, Restaurants, QSR, Home Services, Fitness, Education, etc.).

**Key highlights:**
- Median franchise investment: $500K–$1.5M
- Average franchise fee: ~$35K (a small fraction of total startup cost)
- 250 brands (40%) disclose Item 19 financial performance data
- Investment ranges span $17K (commercial cleaning) to $200M (big-box retail)

Source: State regulatory databases (primarily MN CARDS). Extraction verified against source PDFs.

Interactive comparison tool and API: https://franchisevs.com

**Provenance:** every row is extracted from the brand's actual 2025 Franchise Disclosure Document (FDD) — the legal disclosure franchisors must file — primarily via the Minnesota CARDS public filing system, then normalized, cross-checked (investment-range sums, unit counts), and scored. Maintained by [FranchiseVS](https://franchisevs.com).

Compare any two brands side-by-side, with per-brand cost pages and category guides: [franchisevs.com](https://franchisevs.com)

resources.description: 623 franchise brands with 33 fields: investment ranges, royalty rates, unit counts, financial performance, health scores, and litigation data. Extracted from 2025 FDD filings.

fields.name: brand_name
fields.description: Franchise brand name

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL slug of the brand's profile at franchisevs.com/franchise/<slug>

fields.name: category
fields.description: Primary category (QSR, home services, fitness, ...)

fields.name: subcategory
fields.description: More specific segment within the category

fields.name: year_founded
fields.description: Year the company was founded

fields.name: year_franchising_began
fields.description: Year the company began franchising

fields.name: headquarters_state
fields.description: US state of the corporate headquarters

fields.name: fdd_year
fields.description: Year of the Franchise Disclosure Document the figures were extracted from

fields.name: franchise_fee_low
fields.description: Initial franchise fee, low end, USD (FDD Item 5)

fields.name: franchise_fee_high
fields.description: Initial franchise fee, high end, USD (FDD Item 5)

fields.name: investment_low
fields.description: Total initial investment, low end, USD (FDD Item 7)

fields.name: investment_high
fields.description: Total initial investment, high end, USD (FDD Item 7)

fields.name: royalty_type
fields.description: Royalty structure: percent, flat, or hybrid

fields.name: royalty_value
fields.description: Royalty rate (% of the royalty_basis) or flat amount in USD

fields.name: royalty_basis
fields.description: What the royalty is charged on (gross sales, net revenue, ...)

fields.name: ad_fund_value
fields.description: Advertising/brand fund contribution (% or USD)

fields.name: has_item19
fields.description: TRUE if the FDD discloses financial performance representations (Item 19)

fields.name: average_gross_revenue
fields.description: Average unit gross revenue from Item 19, USD (where disclosed)

fields.name: median_gross_revenue
fields.description: Median unit gross revenue from Item 19, USD (where disclosed)

fields.name: total_units
fields.description: Total operating units (franchised + company-owned)

fields.name: total_franchised
fields.description: Franchised units

fields.name: total_company_owned
fields.description: Company-owned units

fields.name: opened_this_year
fields.description: Units opened in the FDD reporting year

fields.name: closed_this_year
fields.description: Units closed in the FDD reporting year

fields.name: net_change
fields.description: Net unit change in the reporting year

fields.name: net_growth_rate_pct
fields.description: Net unit growth rate, percent

fields.name: term_length_years
fields.description: Initial franchise agreement term, years

fields.name: territory_exclusive
fields.description: TRUE if an exclusive territory is granted

fields.name: health_score
fields.description: FranchiseVS composite health score (0-100) from growth, fees, litigation and disclosure signals

fields.name: fee_burden_pct
fields.description: Ongoing fees (royalty + ad fund) as a percent of revenue

fields.name: payback_period_years
fields.description: Estimated years to recoup the initial investment (midpoint investment / estimated unit margin)

fields.name: litigation_total_cases
fields.description: Litigation cases disclosed in FDD Item 3

fields.name: litigation_risk_level
fields.description: Categorical litigation risk (low / medium / high) derived from Item 3
